params.name: Dark Lord's Diary
params.description: As the Dark Lord believes that he will rule the world one day, keeping a diary has become an unbreakable ritual. As he penned down all his thoughts honestly and injected his spirit into the diary, those who have a weak mind may turn into a believer upon reading it!
